patch:
Index: backend/test_app.py
===================================================================
--- backend/test_app.py	
+++ backend/test_app.py	
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+import os
+import tempfile
+import shutil
+import pytest
+from app import app, INSTALLERS_DIR
+
+
+@pytest.fixture
+def client():
+    app.config['TESTING'] = True
+    with app.test_client() as client:
+        yield client
+
+
+@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
+def ensure_installers_dir(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
+    monkeypatch.setattr('app.INSTALLERS_DIR', str(tmp_path))
+    return tmp_path
+
+
+def test_index_returns_200(client):
+    response = client.get('/')
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+
+
+def test_index_contains_title(client):
+    response = client.get('/')
+    assert 'Instalador' in response.data.decode()
+
+
+def test_index_empty_dir(client):
+    response = client.get('/')
+    assert 'Nenhum instalador disponivel' in response.data.decode()
+
+
+def test_index_lists_files(client, ensure_installers_dir):
+    (ensure_installers_dir / 'test.exe').touch()
+    (ensure_installers_dir / 'setup.msi').touch()
+    response = client.get('/')
+    data = response.data.decode()
+    assert 'test.exe' in data
+    assert 'setup.msi' in data
+
+
+def test_download_file(client, ensure_installers_dir):
+    (ensure_installers_dir / 'installer.exe').write_bytes(b'fake binary')
+    response = client.get('/download/installer.exe')
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+    assert response.data == b'fake binary'
+
+
+def test_download_sets_attachment(client, ensure_installers_dir):
+    (ensure_installers_dir / 'installer.exe').touch()
+    response = client.get('/download/installer.exe')
+    assert 'attachment' in response.headers.get('Content-Disposition', '')
+
+
+def test_download_nonexistent_returns_404(client):
+    response = client.get('/download/nonexistent.exe')
+    assert response.status_code == 404
+
+
+def test_index_skips_directories(client, ensure_installers_dir):
+    (ensure_installers_dir / 'subdir').mkdir()
+    response = client.get('/')
+    assert 'subdir' not in response.data.decode()
